title: daphne alternifolia
intro: Daphne alternifolia, also known as the pink or alternate-leaved daphne, is a flowering shrub native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. The health benefits of Daphne alternifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system. Daphne alternifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
